text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That day off was very much appreciated.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I had time to peruse both the art
museum and that little book town. It was such an
enriching day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I also had enough spare time to develop a
training regimen for working out. ...Do you have
the time to review it with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Mejiro Ardan fully enjoyed her day
off!
